section.heading: “State” defined

content.p: As used in this chapter, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–110, title III, § 302, as added Pub. L. 91–285, § 6, June 22, 1970, 84 Stat. 318; amended Pub. L. 94–73, title IV, § 407, Aug. 6, 1975, 89 Stat. 405.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 1973bb–1 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1975—Pub. L. 94–73 substituted definition of State for provisions prohibiting denial of right to vote because of age.
